title: Llama Manager
description: Buy shop llamas in any quantity, open unopened inventory llamas in bulk, and handle choice packs (CP) with manual selection from the launcher.
note: Shop includes Upgrade / Super Ranged X-Ray llamas and daily event llamas (Mini Reward, Troll Stash, Rad, etc.). Inventory covers unopened Lunar, Holiday, Rad and other stored llamas.

inventory.empty: No unopened regular llamas on this account.

shop.empty: No shop llamas available right now.

choice.hint: Choice packs (CP) let you pick a specific reward. Select options in the dialog or open with the default index.
choice.title: Select choice pack reward
choice.manual-hint: If options are not listed, enter the index manually (usually 0 = first option).

toasts.choice-only: These packs need choice selection — use the Choice (CP) tab.
